name: Catalant Expert Talent Platform REST API
what_it_does: Catalant expert talent platform REST API for enterprises to source, manage, and deploy expert consultants and independent professionals for strategic projects — enabling AI agents to post expert talent requirements, match projects with consultants, manage project engagements, and track deliverables through Catalant's enterprise expert talent marketplace. Enables AI agents to manage project posting for expert talent requirement definition and marketplace posting automation, handle expert matching for consultant search, filter, and recommendation automation, access proposal management for consultant proposal review and selection automation, retrieve engagement management for active project contract and milestone management automation, manage payment management for consultant invoice and payment processing automation, handle deliverable management for project deliverable submission and approval automation, access talent analytics for expert pool utilization and spend analytics automation, retrieve contractor profile management for consultant profile and qualification access automation, manage team management for enterprise expert talent pool creation and curation automation, and integrate Catalant with procurement, HRIS, and project management platforms for enterprise expert talent automation.
use_cases: Posting strategic project requirements and sourcing expert consultants for business operations automation agents
Managing active consulting engagements and tracking deliverable completion for project management agents
Processing consultant invoices and managing expert talent spend for procurement automation agents
Reporting on expert talent utilization across enterprise projects for workforce analytics agents
not_for: High-volume freelance task work (Catalant is expert-level strategic consulting; Upwork and Fiverr serve broader freelance task work)
Full-time employee hiring (Catalant is on-demand consulting; LinkedIn Recruiter and Greenhouse serve FTE hiring)
Offshore and outsourced team staffing (Catalant is expert individual consultants; offshore staffing uses different platforms)
best_when: An enterprise strategy, operations, or procurement team wanting AI agents to source and manage expert consultants for strategic projects through Catalant's curated expert talent marketplace with enterprise procurement integration.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE AGREEMENT IS REQUIRED: Catalant serves enterprise clients; automated public-marketplace assumption creates access_restricted for organizations without Catalant enterprise agreement; automated must be a Catalant enterprise client. EXPERT CURATION LIMITS SUPPLY: Catalant's expert pool is curated (ex-consulting, ex-corporate experts); automated unlimited-talent assumption creates no_match for highly specialized requirements with limited Catalant expert supply; automated must account for talent availability constraints. PROJECT SCOPING IS REQUIRED: Expert engagements require well-defined project scope, timeline, and budget; automated vague-project assumption creates proposal_mismatch for requirements not sufficiently scoped for expert consultants to provide accurate proposals; automated must ensure project requirements are scoped before marketplace posting. API ACCESS IS ENTERPRISE-ONLY: Catalant API access is enterprise integration feature, not public developer API; automated developer-API assumption creates access_denied for organizations expecting public API without enterprise agreement; automated must negotiate API access as part of enterprise agreement.

auth.notes: Catalant uses OAuth2 for Expert Talent Platform REST API. REST API with JSON. Boston, MA HQ. Founded 2013 by Rob Biederman and Patrick Petitti (Harvard MBA). Raised $40M+. Products: Catalant marketplace (expert consulting), Catalant Enterprise (talent management), Catalant Strategy Execution. 30,000+ expert consultants. 300+ Fortune 1000 clients. Industries: financial services, life sciences, technology, consumer. Competes with Toptal, Umbrex, and Eden McCallum for expert consulting talent platforms.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier; enterprise agreement required
pricing.paid_tiers: Platform fee plus consultant margin; enterprise subscription for talent management features; project-based pricing
pricing.notes: Boston MA. $40M raised. 300+ Fortune 1000 clients. Platform fee + margin model. Enterprise contract required.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token; enterprise agreement defines API access levels

known_agent_gotchas: HUMAN CURATION IS PART OF THE PROCESS: Catalant's expert matching involves human curation alongside platform matching; automated fully-algorithmic assumption creates unexpected_delay for engagements requiring Catalant's human matching team intervention; automated must account for human curation time in expert sourcing workflows

PROJECT POSTING REQUIRES STRUCTURED SCOPE: Catalant project posts require defined scope, timeline, budget range, and required expertise; automated freeform-request assumption creates proposal_not_received for underspecified project requirements that don't attract quality expert proposals; automated must structure project requirements before posting

CONSULTANT SELECTION IS MANUAL: Expert selection from proposals involves human review; automated auto-select assumption creates governance_gap for consultant selection without required human approval in procurement workflow; automated must implement human approval step for consultant selection

PAYMENT IS MILESTONE-BASED: Catalant consultant payments are milestone or deliverable-based; automated time-based assumption creates payment_dispute for engagements where payment timing doesn't align with deliverable completion milestones; automated must structure payment to align with deliverable acceptance

ENTERPRISE PROCUREMENT INTEGRATION REQUIRED: Large enterprises require Catalant integration with SAP Ariba or Coupa for PO compliance; automated direct-payment assumption creates procurement_bypass for consultant payments not routed through enterprise procurement system; automated must integrate with enterprise procurement for compliant expert talent spend
agent_readiness.security_notes: Expert talent marketplace. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Expert consultant profiles and engagement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Expert talent platform. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Consultant profile and project engagement data.
